title: alepidocline trifida
side_effects: Alepidocline trifida can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal issues. In severe cases, its extracts can cause convulsions, respiratory distress, and even cardiac arrest. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also lead to kidney damage and liver failure. It is essential to handle and use the Alepidocline trifida plant with extreme caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
